evals.prompt: Create a new Neovim plugin called trailblazer.nvim that adds a :Trail command to list recent file visits.
evals.expected_behavior: Scaffolds lua/trailblazer/init.lua with setup(), config defaults, user command, and tests/ directory with plenary bootstrap.
assertions: Uses lua/<plugin>/ directory structure (not flat .lua file)

evals.prompt: Set up CI with selene, stylua, and plenary for this Neovim plugin repo. It's called waystone.nvim.
evals.expected_behavior: Creates .github/workflows/lint.yml and test.yml with selene, stylua, and plenary on stable + nightly.
assertions: Creates lint workflow with selene and stylua
Creates test workflow with plenary on stable and nightly Neovim
Checks out plenary.nvim as a sibling directory

evals.prompt: Fix the LSP configuration in my init.lua — mason-lspconfig isn't setting up gopls correctly.
evals.expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger neovim-plugin-development. Route to neovim-config instead.
assertions: Routes to neovim-config for user configuration editing
